Requirement: WHILE VehSpd is within [0 kph, 250 kph], THE SYSTEM SHALL process the VehSpd value within [50 ms].
Rationale: The requirement satisfies all rules: it expresses a single behavior (rule1), is objectively verifiable through measurable conditions and timing (rule2), and uses precise language without subjectivity (rule3).

Requirement: IF VehSpd > 250 kph, THEN THE SYSTEM SHALL: - detect F_OOR_HI_VehSpd within [10 ms] - react within [10 ms] - set DTC_101_VSPD_OOR_HI - transition to safe state.
State: Torque = 0 Nm, LKA OFF, Warning ON
Rationale: The requirement violates rule1 (must_be_atomic) as it specifies multiple distinct behaviors (detect, react, set DTC, transition) under a single conditional statement, rather than expressing only one behavior.
